en:
Emma came back from a long trip last week.
She has visited many places abroad this spring.
"I have already seen the sea in Greece," she told her friends.
She has also climbed a high mountain in Switzerland.
Her friends asked, "Have you eaten Italian food yet?"
"Yes, I have," she said with a smile.
It has been the best experience of her life.
She wants to travel abroad again soon.
cn:
上周艾玛结束了一趟长途旅行回来了。
今年春天她已经去过许多国外的地方。
"我已经看过希腊的大海了，"她告诉朋友们。
她还在瑞士爬过一座高山。
朋友们问："你尝过意大利菜了吗？"
"尝过了，"她笑着说。
这是她一生中最棒的经历。
她想很快再次出国旅行。

en:
There was an accident near the corner last night.
A young driver was turning left in the dark.
An old man was crossing the street at that moment.
Some people were waiting for the bus by the road.
Suddenly they heard a loud crash.
The driver was looking at his phone before it happened.
Nobody was hurt in the accident.
The police were writing down everything when I left.
cn:
昨晚拐角附近发生了一起事故。
一位年轻司机正在黑暗中左转。
那一刻一位老人正在过马路。
一些人正在路边等公交车。
突然他们听到一声巨响。
事故发生前那位司机正在看手机。
事故中没有人受伤。
我离开时警察正在把一切都记下来。

en:
Mr Lin has put his old car up for sale.
He has been the owner of it for eight years.
The engine has worked well since he bought it.
He has repaired it only twice since 2018.
A buyer asked, "How long have you had it?"
"I have driven it for eight years," he answered.
The price has not changed since last week.
The buyer has decided to see the car tomorrow.
cn:
林先生把他的旧车挂出来出售了。
他做这辆车的主人已经八年了。
自从他买下它，发动机一直运转良好。
从2018年起他只修过它两次。
一位买家问："你有这辆车多久了？"
"我开了它八年了，"他回答。
价格从上周起就没变过。
买家已经决定明天来看车。

en:
We went to see poor Ian's new flat today.
But he was not there, and the door was open.
The rooms were completely empty.
A neighbour said, "Ian has moved away."
"He has gone to another city," she added.
He has sold this flat, so nobody lives here now.
He has never left us his new address.
We have been to his old flat for nothing.
cn:
今天我们去看可怜的伊恩的新公寓。
可他不在，门却开着。
房间里空空如也。
一位邻居说："伊恩搬走了。"
"他去了另一座城市，"她补充道。
他把这间公寓卖了，所以现在没人住在这里。
他从没给我们留下新地址。
我们白去了一趟他的旧公寓。

en:
A new neighbour has just come to our building.
They are going to paint the walls white.
The man plans to buy some new furniture next week.
His wife is going to grow flowers in the garden.
"What are you going to do with the old door?" I asked.
"We will change it soon," the man said.
They are going to have a big party for us.
I think they will be very good neighbours.
cn:
我们楼里刚搬来一户新邻居。
他们打算把墙刷成白色。
那位男士计划下周买些新家具。
他的妻子打算在花园里种花。
"你们打算怎么处理那扇旧门？"我问。
"我们很快就会把它换掉，"那位男士说。
他们打算为我们办一场大聚会。
我想他们会是非常好的邻居。

en:
The train will arrive at the station in ten minutes.
A man is looking for his ticket everywhere.
"Will you collect the tickets at the gate?" he asked.
"Yes, every passenger will show a ticket," said the officer.
"I will buy another one on the platform," the man said.
The officer answered, "The shop will not be open so early."
So the man will pay at the office later.
He will not forget his ticket next time.
cn:
火车将在十分钟后到站。
一个男人正在到处找他的车票。
"你会在检票口收票吗？"他问。
"是的，每位乘客都要出示车票，"乘务员说。
"我会在站台上再买一张，"那个男人说。
乘务员回答："这么早商店还不会开门。"
所以这个男人稍后会到办公室去付款。
下次他不会再忘带车票了。

en:
A woman lost her case at the airport yesterday.
She went to the office and described it to a man.
"It was a small blue leather case," she said.
The handle of the case was broken.
She put some books and a coat in it.
The man looked at every case in the room.
At last he found it under a big brown one.
He returned the small case to the happy woman.
cn:
昨天一位女士在机场丢了箱子。
她来到办公室，向一位工作人员描述它。
"那是一个蓝色的小皮箱，"她说。
箱子的把手坏了。
她在里面放了一些书和一件外套。
那位工作人员查看了房间里的每一个箱子。
最后他在一个棕色的大箱子下面找到了它。
他把这个小箱子还给了高兴的女士。
